claim: LiteParse preserves document spatial layout by projecting text onto a spatial grid rather than converting to markdown
actionable: Use LiteParse for document parsing to maintain table structure and spatial relationships without table detection

claim: The framework era for LLM applications is ending due to better agent reasoning, MCPs/skills discovery, and coding agents
actionable: Transition from framework-heavy solutions to agent-centric architectures that leverage modern LLM capabilities

claim: Frontier vision models struggle with production OCR at scale - dense tables, handwritten forms, and cost efficiency matters
actionable: Supplement vision models with specialized local OCR tools like LiteParse for production document processing
